steps.title: Use the direct result
steps.content: The passage says friction between graphene pieces was already extremely low. When the researchers added oil as lubrication, that friction nearly vanished.

steps.title: Reject other events
steps.content: Choice A claims the graphene moved to one surface, which is not stated. Choice C describes nanotubes breaking down, a setup step before the oil. Choice D contradicts the stated near-vanishing of friction. The answer is B.
